Notes: * 12th meeting: NJCU leads all-time series, which began in 1977-78, 12-1, and
* NJCU snaps 42-game losing streak over parts of three seasons. First win
since December 20, 2016 (123-44) vs. Vaughn in Jersey City.

Game.Officials: Charles Bell,  Fran Forenza,  Ted Sochaski
